data: * Estimate does not meet NCHS standards of reliability / **While the estimate meets NCHS standards of reliability, its complement does not / -Quantity zero

Responses to the questions regarding feelings of sadness, hopelessness, worthlessness, that everything is an effort, nervousness, and restlessness were combined to create an indicator of serious psychological distress.
